mapper.select: WITH ACTIVE_STUDENT AS ( SELECT SC.CLASS_ID, COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_COUNT FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.END_DATE IS NULL GROUP BY SC.CLASS_ID ), ACTIVE_LEARN AS ( SELECT LL.CLASS_ID, COUNT(*) AS LEARN_COUNT FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 GROUP BY LL.CLASS_ID ), LEARN_TARGET AS ( SELECT SUM(NVL(S.STUDENT_COUNT, 0) * NVL(L.LEARN_COUNT, 0)) AS TOTAL_TARGET_COUNT FROM CLASS C LEFT JOIN ACTIVE_STUDENT S ON S.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID LEFT JOIN ACTIVE_LEARN L ON L.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID WHERE C.CLASS_STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'ARCHIVED', 'BLINDED') ), LEARN_COMPLETED AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS COMPLETED_COUNT FROM LEARN_PRO LP JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_ID = LP.LEARN_ID JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = LP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL WHERE NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ), LATEST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), ASSIGN_SUBMITTED AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS SUBMITTED_COUNT FROM LATEST_SUB LS WHERE LS.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL ) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.ACCOUNT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS "totalUsers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASS C WHERE C.CLASS_STATUS = 'ACTIVE') AS "activeClassCount", (SELECT NVL(SUBMITTED_COUNT, 0) FROM ASSIGN_SUBMITTED) AS "submittedAssignmentCount", (SELECT NVL(COMPLETED_COUNT, 0) FROM LEARN_COMPLETED) AS "completedLearnCount", (SELECT NVL(TOTAL_TARGET_COUNT, 0) FROM LEARN_TARGET) AS "totalLearnTargetCount" FROM DUAL

SELECT A.ROLE_CODE AS "roleCode", COUNT(*) AS "value" FROM AUTHORITY A JOIN MEMBER M ON M.MEMBER_ID = A.MEMBER_ID WHERE M.ACCOUNT_STATUS != 'DELETED' GROUP BY A.ROLE_CODE ORDER BY CASE A.ROLE_CODE WHEN 'STUDENT' THEN 1 WHEN 'PARENT' THEN 2 WHEN 'TEACHER' THEN 3 WHEN 'ADMIN' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END

SELECT T.LABEL AS "label", SUM(T.STUDENT_COUNT) AS "studentCount", SUM(T.PARENT_COUNT) AS "parentCount", SUM(T.TEACHER_COUNT) AS "teacherCount" FROM ( SELECT
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT), 'MM/DD') AS LABEL, TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT) AS SORT_DATE
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT, 'IW'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LABEL, TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT, 'IW') AS SORT_DATE
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT, 'MM'), 'YYYY/MM') AS LABEL, TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT, 'MM') AS SORT_DATE
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY'), 'YYYY') AS LABEL, TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') AS SORT_DATE
TO_CHAR(TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT), 'MM/DD') AS LABEL, TRUNC(M.CREATED_AT) AS SORT_DATE
, CASE WHEN A.ROLE_CODE = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS STUDENT_COUNT, CASE WHEN A.ROLE_CODE = 'PARENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PARENT_COUNT, CASE WHEN A.ROLE_CODE = 'TEACHER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS TEACHER_COUNT FROM MEMBER M JOIN AUTHORITY A ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE M.ACCOUNT_STATUS != 'DELETED' AND M.CREATED_AT >=
TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6
TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 27
ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -11)
ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), -48)
TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 6
) T GROUP BY T.LABEL, T.SORT_DATE ORDER BY T.SORT_DATE

WITH LATEST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ) SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS "classId", C.CLASS_NAME AS "classDisplayName", C.CLASS_STATUS AS "classStatus", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) AS "studentCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ) AS "totalLearnCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_ID = LP.LEARN_ID JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = LP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = LL.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ) AS "completedLearnCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT A WHERE A.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ) AS "totalAssignmentCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT A JOIN LATEST_SUB LS ON LS.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID WHERE A.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND LS.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL ) AS "submittedAssignmentCount" FROM CLASS C WHERE C.CLASS_STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'ARCHIVED', 'BLINDED') ORDER BY CASE C.CLASS_STATUS WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'ARCHIVED' THEN 2 WHEN 'BLINDED' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END, C.CLASS_ID DESC

SELECT C.CLASS_ID AS "classId", C.CLASS_NAME AS "classDisplayName", C.CLASS_STATUS AS "classStatus", NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ), 0) AS "studentCount", NVL(( SELECT MAX(T.TEACHER_NAME) FROM TEACHER_CLASS TC JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = TC.TEACHER_ID WHERE TC.CLASS_ID = C.CLASS_ID ), '-') AS "teacherName", NVL(TO_CHAR(C.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY.MM.DD'), '-') AS "createdDateText" FROM CLASS C WHERE C.CLASS_ID = #{classId}

WITH ACTIVE_STUDENT AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_COUNT FROM STUDENT_CLASS WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND END_DATE IS NULL ), LATEST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), BASE AS ( SELECT A.ASSIGN_ID AS SORT_ID, CASE WHEN LENGTH(A.TITLE) > 12 THEN SUBSTR(A.TITLE, 1, 12) || '...' ELSE A.TITLE END AS "label", COUNT(LS.SUB_ID) AS "submittedCount", GREATEST((SELECT STUDENT_COUNT FROM ACTIVE_STUDENT) - COUNT(LS.SUB_ID), 0) AS "unsubmittedCount" FROM ASSIGNMENT A LEFT JOIN LATEST_SUB LS ON LS.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND LS.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 GROUP BY A.ASSIGN_ID, A.TITLE ORDER BY A.ASSIGN_ID DESC ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.* FROM BASE B ORDER BY B.SORT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 7

WITH ACTIVE_STUDENT AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS STUDENT_COUNT FROM STUDENT_CLASS WHERE CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND END_DATE IS NULL ), BASE AS ( SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS SORT_ID, CASE WHEN LENGTH(LC.TITLE) > 12 THEN SUBSTR(LC.TITLE, 1, 12) || '...' ELSE LC.TITLE END AS "label", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ) AS "completedCount", GREATEST( (SELECT STUDENT_COUNT FROM ACTIVE_STUDENT) - ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ), 0 ) AS "incompleteCount" FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ORDER BY LC.LEARN_ID DESC ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.* FROM BASE B ORDER BY B.SORT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 7

WITH LATEST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), LAST_ASSIGN_STATUS AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.CLASS_ID, LS.STUDENT_ID, CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(LS.RETURN_REASON), '') != '' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(LS.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RETURNED', 'REJECTED') OR LS.SUBMIT_STATUS = '반려' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(LS.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR LS.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(LS.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR LS.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN LS.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL THEN '제출완료' ELSE '-' END AS LAST_STATUS, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.CLASS_ID, LS.STUDENT_ID ORDER BY NVL(LS.SUBMIT_AT, A.CREATED_AT) DESC, LS.SUB_ID DESC ) AS RN FROM ASSIGNMENT A LEFT JOIN LATEST_SUB LS ON LS.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ) WHERE RN = 1 ) SELECT S.STUDENT_ID AS "studentId", S.STUDENT_NAME AS "studentName", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_LIST LL JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_LIST_ID = LL.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ) AS "totalLearnCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO LP JOIN LEARN_CONT LC ON LC.LEARN_ID = LP.LEARN_ID JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND LP.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND LP.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ) AS "completedLearnCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT A WHERE A.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 ) AS "totalAssignmentCount", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT A JOIN LATEST_SUB LS ON LS.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID WHERE A.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND LS.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID AND LS.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL ) AS "submittedAssignmentCount", NVL(LA.LAST_STATUS, '-') AS "lastAssignmentStatusText" FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SC.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN LAST_ASSIGN_STATUS LA ON LA.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID AND LA.STUDENT_ID = S.STUDENT_ID WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME
